title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chatting, embedding and model management.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with the local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama models as LLM and embeddings providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama with folder organization, code highlighting, RAG and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing sync/async APIs and model management utilities.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API in Rails or plain Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Simple Python CLI that wraps ollama-python for colorful terminal chat sessions with history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub-Copilot-like assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-curated recipes showing how to integrate Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker, GPU, etc.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose files for running Ollama server with CUDA or CPU only.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit UI for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams responses from local Ollama models into any guild channel.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing TypeScript types and fetch-based client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package offering sync and async Python clients for Ollama with full API coverage.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for talking to Ollama, enabling mobile/desktop apps to run local LLMs.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that plugs into your workspace to answer questions using local Ollama models.
